s: In 1972, Don Durham suited up for STL as a two_way. Key numbers: AVG 0.500, OPS 1.429, HR 2, RBI 4, WAR 1.500.
Changed teams after the previous season (STL -> TEX).
In 1973, Don Durham suited up for TEX as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 7.590, WHIP 1.790, SO 23, WAR -0.400. Notable context: Joined TEX.
